prompt: Add normalize_profile(profile), returning a new dict with trimmed name fields and a lowercase trimmed email without mutating the input. Add tests, document this behavior in README, and run the suite.

argv: import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'src'); from profiles import normalize_profile; original={'first_name':' Ada ','last_name':' Lovelace ','email':' ADA@EXAMPLE.COM ','active':True}; result=normalize_profile(original); assert result == {'first_name':'Ada','last_name':'Lovelace','email':'ada@example.com','active':True}; assert original['first_name'] == ' Ada '; assert result is not original
from pathlib import Path; text=Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8').lower(); assert 'normalize_profile' in text and 'mutat' in text
